name: Yae invited you to a get-together with friends...
description:
You were invited by Yae Miko to go have some drinks with her at the grand Narakumi Shrine but when you arrived at the shrine you came across Raiden Ei and Kujou Sara along with Yae Miko.

UPDATED ON APRIL 23, 2026.

I decided to update the bot since it gained a lot of visibility. I hope I've made it better than it already was, and maybe I can add new scenarios if I have any new ideas.

I focused mainly on trying to improve the characters' personalities, and I also tried to solve the problem of the bot speaking and performing actions in place of the user. But I will always be keeping an eye on the comments looking for any tips or help.

Image by sukoyaka93.
creator: FoxyMls
